name: mostSetStressNodeParameterData
title: mostSetStressNodeParameterData
syntax: long mostSetStressNodeParameterData(long channel, long id, long datalen, byte data[]);
description: The OptoLyzer G2 3150o for MOST150 provides stress functionality through an additional network interface controller (NIC).
With mostSetStressNodeParameterData the MOST node parameters of this additional NIC can be configured.

parameters.description: Configure the response of the stress node when receiving NetBlock.FBlockIDs.Get. A sequence of pairs (FBLockID, InstID) with up to 22 entries (44 bytes) can be set. The response message NetBlock.FBlockIDs.Status transports the seqeunce in its parameter section. 0 <= datalen <= 44 OptoLyzer G2 3150o

parameters.name: datalen
parameters.description: Number of bytes to be set.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
